text: I love their filet o' fishes, they're not too salty like most fast food fried fish sandwiches.  Looking at you Burger King.  They're so expensive that I'll only buy it if its BOGO (or like 29cents through their app if you buy a second one).  It's such a small sandwich and I always talk myself into getting something more filling like a few McDoubles/Chicken Sandwiches instead.

It was a 21 hour video. I loved the beginning and hated the end. Starting the game had the most traumatic, heart wrenching, and terrible end to joel. But after that... every death got quicker and meant soo much less. Near the end Abby killed a guy that meant a fair bit to everyone instantly when ellie and him went through the door and instead of, you know, morning for a minute to let it sink in and make you feel like something was lost, abby said "get up" and she stood up and we never revisited the guys death again. At the end we had a kill chain of like, 4 people that all played big parts in the story and there was hardly any remorse, morning, or really anything. GAAHH, i'm upset by the games development team. Butchered, just butchered the story line
